title: StoneSpeaks
shortDescription: AI-powered app for recognizing Bihar monuments with historical descriptions.

details.overview: StoneSpeaks is an AI-powered Android app that identifies monuments in Bihar with 96.04% accuracy, provides rich historical descriptions, shares Google Maps locations, and suggests nearby attractions, making heritage accessible to tourists.
details.technologies: Java, TensorFlow, InceptionV3, OpenCV, Gemini API, TFLite, Android Studio, Imageye, Machine Learning, Computer Vision, Mobile Development
features: Real-time monument recognition using fine-tuned InceptionV3.
Custom dataset of 1,950+ images (39 classes), augmented to 6,000.
TFLite model integration for efficient mobile performance.
Gemini API for contextual descriptions with text-to-speech.
Google Maps integration for location and nearby places.
details.challenges: Curating a diverse dataset for lesser-known monuments and optimizing TFLite for low-end devices.
futureEnhancements: Implement YOLO-based real-time video recognition.
Develop a custom description generator with historical data.
Add smart travel suggestions for self-guided tours.

title: Heart Disease Prediction System
shortDescription: ML web app to predict heart disease risk from medical parameters.

details.overview: A web-based machine learning application that predicts heart disease risk with 90.6% accuracy using medical parameters like age, cholesterol, and blood pressure.
details.technologies: Python, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Scikit-Learn, Streamlit, GitHub, Machine Learning, Data Visualization, Web Development
features: Binary classification using Logistic Regression.
Extensive EDA with visualizations of distributions and correlations.
Data preprocessing with StandardScaler and one-hot encoding.
Performance metrics via ROC curves, confusion matrices, and precision-recall curves.
Interactive Streamlit app for live user predictions.
details.challenges: Managing imbalanced data and ensuring user-friendly input validation in the Streamlit app.
futureEnhancements: Integrate advanced models like XGBoost.
Add personalized health recommendations.
Expand dataset with diverse patient profiles.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
shortDescription: Responsive portfolio showcasing projects, skills, and achievements.

details.overview: A responsive personal portfolio website (omprakas.tech) showcasing projects, skills, certifications, and achievements with a modern, interactive design.
details.technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, AOS, GitHub Pages, Web Development, UI/UX Design, Responsive Design
features: Responsive layout optimized for mobile and desktop.
Interactive project grid with filterable categories.
Modals with detailed project descriptions and links.
AOS animations for smooth scrolling effects.
Dark/light theme toggle for accessibility.
details.challenges: Optimizing performance for mobile devices and ensuring cross-browser compatibility.
futureEnhancements: Add a blog section for technical articles.
Integrate a contact form with backend support.
Enhance animations with WebGL or Three.js.

title: Inventory Management System
shortDescription: Python-based system for managing products and tracking inventory.

details.overview: A Python-based inventory management system designed to streamline business operations by enabling efficient product management, sales tracking, discount application, and stock monitoring.
details.technologies: Python, Tkinter, JSON, Pandas, GUI Development, Data Management
features: Add, update, and delete product records with details like price and quantity.
Track sales transactions and generate summary reports.
Monitor stock levels with automated low-stock alerts.
Apply discounts during checkout with real-time calculations.
details.challenges: Ensuring data consistency with JSON-based storage and designing an intuitive GUI for diverse user needs.
futureEnhancements: Integrate a database (e.g., SQLite) for scalable data storage.
Add multi-user support with role-based access.
Implement exportable analytics dashboards.

title: Iris Flower Classification
shortDescription: ML model to classify Iris flowers using classification algorithms.

details.overview: A machine learning project to classify Iris flowers into three species based on sepal and petal measurements, comparing the performance of multiple classification algorithms.
details.technologies: Python, Scikit-Learn, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Jupyter Notebook, Machine Learning, Data Analysis
features: Exploratory data analysis to visualize feature distributions and correlations.
Trained models including Logistic Regression, SVM, and Random Forest.
Evaluated performance with accuracy, precision, and confusion matrices.
Applied hyperparameter tuning to optimize model accuracy.
details.challenges: Managing feature scaling for small datasets and selecting the best algorithm for generalization.
futureEnhancements: Integrate deep learning models like neural networks.
Develop a web interface for real-time predictions.
Expand dataset with additional features.

title: Email Spam Detection
shortDescription: ML model using NLP to classify emails as spam or non-spam.

details.overview: A machine learning model that uses natural language processing to classify emails as spam or non-spam, improving email filtering efficiency.
details.technologies: Python, Scikit-Learn, NLTK, Pandas, TfidfVectorizer, Jupyter Notebook, NLP, Machine Learning
features: Text preprocessing with tokenization and stop-word removal.
TF-IDF vectorization for feature extraction.
Trained Naive Bayes and SVM models, achieving ~95% accuracy.
Visualized results with confusion matrices and ROC curves.
details.challenges: Handling imbalanced datasets and optimizing text preprocessing for accuracy.
futureEnhancements: Implement deep learning models like LSTM for better performance.
Add real-time email classification via API integration.
Enhance preprocessing with advanced NLP techniques.

title: Voice Controlled Assistant
shortDescription: Python-based assistant for tasks via voice commands.

details.overview: A Python-based voice-controlled assistant that performs tasks like opening applications, searching the web, and setting reminders using voice commands.
details.technologies: Python, SpeechRecognition, pyttsx3, PyAutoGUI, Jupyter Notebook, Speech Processing, Automation
features: Real-time speech recognition using Google Speech API.
Text-to-speech responses with customizable voices.
Automation of tasks like launching apps and web searches.
Error handling for poor audio input.
details.challenges: Improving recognition accuracy in noisy environments and managing API latency.
futureEnhancements: Add offline speech recognition capabilities.
Integrate AI for natural language understanding.
Expand functionality with IoT device control.

title: Munim - Expense Tracker Web Application
shortDescription: Web app for tracking expenses and managing budgets.

details.overview: Munim is a web application for expense tracking, budget management, and financial analytics, featuring a user-friendly dashboard and secure authentication.
details.technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Firebase, Web Development, UI/UX Design
features: Secure user authentication (User: admin, Password: Password).
Interactive dashboard with expense visualizations.
Budget setting and savings goal tracking.
Responsive design for mobile and desktop.
details.challenges: Implementing secure authentication and optimizing real-time data visualization.
futureEnhancements: Add multi-user support with personalized accounts.
Integrate predictive analytics for spending trends.
Enhance UI with advanced animations.

title: Data Analysis Dashboard
shortDescription: Interactive dashboard for visualizing large datasets.

details.overview: An interactive dashboard built with Python and Plotly to visualize and analyze large datasets, providing actionable insights through dynamic charts.
details.technologies: Python, Plotly, Pandas, Dash, Jupyter Notebook, Data Visualization, Web Development
features: Interactive charts (bar, line, scatter) for data exploration.
Customizable filters for data views.
Exportable reports in CSV and PNG formats.
Responsive layout for accessibility.
details.challenges: Optimizing performance for large datasets and ensuring cross-browser compatibility.
futureEnhancements: Add real-time data streaming capabilities.
Integrate machine learning for predictive insights.
Enhance interactivity with advanced filters.

title: Unemployment Analysis
shortDescription: ML model to analyze and predict unemployment trends.

details.overview: A machine learning model to analyze unemployment trends and predict future employment status, identifying key economic factors.
details.technologies: Python, Scikit-Learn, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Jupyter Notebook, Machine Learning, Data Analysis
features: Exploratory data analysis with trend visualizations.
Trained regression and classification models for predictions.
Visualized results with heatmaps and trend graphs.
Feature importance analysis for key factors.
details.challenges: Handling missing data and ensuring model generalizability across regions.
futureEnhancements: Incorporate real-time economic data feeds.
Develop a web app for interactive analysis.
Expand to global unemployment trends.
